title: circaea alpina var. pilosula
intro: Circaea alpina var. pilosula, also known as the alpine enchanter's nightshade, is a plant species within the evening primrose family, characterized by its unique white flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Circaea alpina var. pilosula include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate menstrual cramps, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, salves, and tinctures, which can be applied topically to the skin or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
